headline: What oil price will be required to stop people from travelling?
summary: Investing.com -- The global energy market is facing a structural crisis as the conflict in the Middle East effectively chokes off one of the world’s most critical maritime arteries.

raw.headline: What oil price will be required to stop people from travelling?

headline: China looks better placed than most in this oil shock. Here’s why
summary: Investing.com – China appears better placed than most major economies to withstand the ongoing oil shock triggered by Middle East tensions, with structural advantages in its energy mix, supply diversification and strategic reserves helping cushion the impact, according to Goldman Sachs.

raw.headline: China looks better placed than most in this oil shock. Here’s why

headline: Why Iran war is an energy shock, not just an oil shock
summary: Investing.com – The war involving Iran is shaping up to be an energy shock, not just an oil shock, with broader implications across global markets and supply chains, according to Bank of America.

raw.headline: Why Iran war is an energy shock, not just an oil shock
raw.summary: Investing.com – The war involving Iran is shaping up to be an energy shock, not just an oil shock, with broader implications across global markets and supply chains, according to Bank of America.

headline: Fed still likely to cut rates in 2026 despite oil shock, Morgan Stanley says
summary: Investing.com — Morgan Stanley expects the Federal Reserve to proceed with interest rate cuts in 2026 despite the recent oil-driven inflation shock, arguing that underlying price pressures remain contained and unlikely to derail the broader disinflation trend.

raw.headline: Fed still likely to cut rates in 2026 despite oil shock, Morgan Stanley says

headline: Vietnam’s Q1 growth cools as Middle East energy shock drives $3.6B trade deficit
summary: Investing.com -- Vietnam’s economic momentum slowed in the first quarter of 2026 as the escalating conflict in the Middle East severely impacted energy security and triggered a sharp rise in domestic inflation.
